modification_policy: This manifest is exposed for read access only. No public write, edit, delete, or mutation route is provided.
service_type: public shell with protected processing layer

core_structure.protected_layer: payment, order, intake, and protected API routes
core_structure.private_engine: 14-field engine retained behind the public shell
core_structure.catalogue: database-backed catalogue and service record layer
core_structure.advertising: public advertising and service discovery path

A2A.name: agent-to-agent
A2A.purpose: Allows approved systems, agents, or services to discover and interact with the shell through defined public and protected endpoints.

B2B.name: business-to-business
B2B.purpose: Allows businesses to access service description, quote flow, order flow, payment flow, and controlled processing routes.

A2B.name: agent-to-business
A2B.purpose: Allows an agent or automated system to submit structured intake or service requests into the protected business layer.

B2A.name: business-to-agent
B2A.purpose: Allows the business shell to return structured responses, service status, catalogue information, and controlled outputs to approved agents or systems.

business_use.summary: The shell acts as a controlled service gateway. Public discovery and health routes remain open, while quote, order, payment, intake, and engine-connected routes remain protected.
business_use.advantage_over_standard_site: A standard site mostly displays pages. This shell separates discovery, payment, service intake, catalogue access, protected processing, and private-engine connection into a controlled service structure.
